rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. VS. PARVANEH ALIZADEH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 13, 2011, line 7. Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank's Motion to compel Responses to Admission/Interrogatories. Grant and deny in part. Subject to opposition. 1) Grant taking of deposition. Defendant shall appear Dec 15 or 16. 2) Deny production of documents failed to show meet and confer. Sanctions denied. (501/REQ)
